title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: openalexSnowball R package performing snowball citation searches OpenAlex academic graph. Starting seed papers (“keypapers”), retrieves citing cited works, extracts citation network nodes edges stored Parquet format. built top openalexPro (≥0.4.0) processes large corpora without memory constraints using disk-based storage.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Run R session via Rscript -e:
code: # Document (regenerate NAMESPACE and Rd files) roxygen2::roxygenise()  # Run all tests devtools::test()  # Run a single test file testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-004-pro_snowball.R")  # Check coverage covr::package_coverage()  # Full package check devtools::check()  # Build documentation site pkgdown::build_site()

title: CLAUDE.md
code: Seed papers (OpenAlex ID or DOI)   → pro_snowball()       → pro_snowball_get_nodes()   # fetches papers via openalexPro       → pro_snowball_extract_edges()  # SQL-based edge classification   → Parquet dataset (output/nodes/ + output/edges/)       → read_snowball()            # load as Arrow Dataset or tibble

title: CLAUDE.md
text: openalexPro: Drives pro_query → pro_request → pro_request_jsonl pipeline fetches converts OpenAlex API responses Parquet DuckDB: -process SQL engine used aggregation pro_snowball_get_nodes edge classification inst/extract_edges.sql Apache Arrow: Parquet /O lazy columnar evaluation via arrow::open_dataset() dplyr: Tidy manipulation interface Arrow/DuckDB

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Edges classified SQL script three types: - core: edges directly /keypapers - extended: edges collected papers (superset core) - outside: edges pointing papers nodes collection

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Tests use testthat (edition 3) VCR HTTP cassette replay. main test file (tests/testthat/test-004-pro_snowball.R) validates output openalexR::oa_snowball() reference implementation. VCR cassettes live tests/fixtures/. helper tests/testthat/helper_vcr.R configures VCR test suite.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Four GitHub Actions workflows: - R-CMD-check.yaml: matrix check across macOS/Windows/Ubuntu R release/devel/oldrel-1 - test-coverage.yaml: coverage via covr, uploads Codecov - pkgdown.yaml: builds deploys documentation site GitHub Pages - rhub.yaml: additional R-hub platform checks

title: Snowball Searches
text: openalexSnowball provides snowball search utilities build openalexPro pipeline. snowball search starts set key papers follows citation links collect cited citing works. Results stored disk parquet datasets can loaded back R using read_snowball().

title: Snowball Searches
text: Keypapers can identified OpenAlex IDs DOIs.
code: snowball_dir <- "./snowball_ids" pro_snowball(   identifier = c("W2741809807", "W2755950973"),   output = snowball_dir,   verbose = TRUE ) snowball_dir_dois <- "./snowball_dois" pro_snowball(   doi = c("10.1016/j.joi.2017.08.007", "10.7717/peerj.4375"),   output = snowball_dir_dois,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Snowball Searches
text: Keypapers can identified OpenAlex IDs DOIs.

title: Snowball Searches
code: snowball_dir <- "./snowball_ids" pro_snowball(   identifier = c("W2741809807", "W2755950973"),   output = snowball_dir,   verbose = TRUE ) snowball_dir_dois <- "./snowball_dois" pro_snowball(   doi = c("10.1016/j.joi.2017.08.007", "10.7717/peerj.4375"),   output = snowball_dir_dois,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Snowball Searches
text: Use read_snowball() load nodes edges. output can Arrow Dataset (default) collected memory tibbles.
code: snowball <- read_snowball(   snowball = snowball_dir,   edge_type = c("core", "extended"),   return_data = TRUE,   shorten_ids = TRUE )  snowball$nodes snowball$edges

title: Snowball Searches
text: snowball search writes folder structure similar following:
code: snowball/ ├── cited_json/ ├── cited_jsonl/ ├── citing_json/ ├── citing_jsonl/ ├── edges/ ├── keypaper_json/ ├── keypaper_jsonl/ ├── keypaper_parquet/ └── nodes/

title: Snowball Searches
text: Use return_data = FALSE keep large datasets disk. Use edge_type = "core" need edges involving keypapers.

title: Snowball searches for OpenAlex using the openalexPro pipeline
text: package builds package openalexR provides advanced approach retrieve works OpenAlex. contrast openalexR, processing conversions memory. processing memory advantages smaller smaller number records retrieved OpenAlex, limits te number works can retrieved due memory limitations. Even limit reached, often occurring new allocation memory slows processing. first step, contrast, openalexPro uses disc processing approach data processed number records returned per call, .e. per page processing approach.

title: Snowball searches for OpenAlex using the openalexPro pipeline
text: retrieval works initial processing / preparation can split three steps: first step (openalexPro::pro_request()), page API call saved individual json file returned API. number retrieved records effectively limited space drive json files saved. complete responses including metadata saved, one end use custom made code process responses, .e. ingest database. second step (openalexPro::pro_request_jsonl()), json files processed per file basis using jq command-line json processor. step abstract text re-constructed, citation string work generated, optionally add page field added. writes resulting json file newline-delimited JSON (.jsonl), suitable processing using arrow DuckDB. Int third (final) step (openalexPro::pro_request_jsonl_parquet()) converts jsonl files parquet database partitioned page using duckdb package. , processing done per page well, conversion limited memory. approach results stable pipeline works retrieval small well large huge corpora. processing done per page (maximum 200 works), scaling less linear (one application, 4 million works retrieved without problems). One point needs taken consideration retrieving huge corpora, rate limits OpenAlex (see details). final format used package save retrieved data parquet format space efficient allows disc processing, therefor need load complete data memory (see detailed description format well r-package arrow). use disc processing R, arrow packages interfaces directly dplyr, one can lot processing retrieving actual data memory (see section dplyr arrow well general arrow chapter Hadleys Wickhams R Data Science (2e) bookhttps://r4ds.hadley.nz).

title: Read snowball from Parquet Dataset — read_snowball
text: snowball directory Parquet files poppulater pro_snowball(). edge_type type returned edges. Possible values : core: edges keypapers selected extended, edges nodes selected (includes core edges) outside:  edges either nodes multiple allowed. return_data Logical indicating whether return ArrowObject representing corpus (default) tibble containing whole corpus shou,d returned. shorten_ids TRUE ids shortened, .e. part https://openalex.org/ removed

title: Read snowball from Parquet Dataset — read_snowball
